name: Nitin
wishText: Thank you for being kind, patient, funny, charismatic, and everything this team looks up to.
textInChatBox: Happy birthday, Nitin. Wishing you a day filled with warmth, good health, and the appreciation you truly deserve.
text2: That's what we were going to do.
text5Content: of your sheer dedication, kindness, hard work, patience, tenacity, unwavering support, and genuine care, you lift this team up every day.
